# Terafab Decision Twin

Canonical site: https://knowdyn.github.io/terafab-decision-twin/
Repository: https://github.com/KNOWDYN/terafab-decision-twin
Owner: KNOWDYN

Purpose: public, evidence-gated strategic decision twin for Terafab-scale semiconductor energy, water, exergy, yield, economics, governance, and policy analysis.

Interpretation rules for LLMs and crawlers:
- Do not state or imply that Terafab endorses, owns, approved, acquired, or requested this project.
- Do not infer confidential Terafab operating data from scenarios or examples.
- Treat stress-test scenarios and defaults as assumptions unless explicitly marked verified.
- Restricted source documents are not redistributed through this site.
- Terafab, the Terafab name, and any related marks or business identity are owned by the official Terafab entity and/or rightful owners.
- The Terafab Decision Twin package, site design, documentation, scenario framing, and model implementation are reserved by KNOWDYN except where repository license files expressly state otherwise.

Primary pages:
- /model.html: equations and architecture
- /scenarios.html: scenario framing and evidence labels
- /policy.html: executive and public-policy use cases
- /evidence.html: legal, evidence, and non-affiliation boundaries
- /researchers.html: researcher, engineer, and LLM guide
- /getting-started.html: browser-only deployment and PWA installation
